mapper.sql: exists ( select 1 from jst_student_channel_binding b where b.user_id = o.user_id and b.channel_id = #{channelId} and b.status = 'active' and b.del_flag = '0' )
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(o.net_pay_amount), 0.00) from jst_order_main o where o.del_flag = '0' and and o.order_status in ('paid', 'reviewing', 'in_service', 'aftersale', 'completed') and o.pay_time is not null and o.pay_time >= #{startTime} and o.pay_time < #{endTime}

select date_format(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, count(1) as orderCount, coalesce(sum(case when o.order_status in ('paid', 'reviewing', 'in_service', 'aftersale', 'completed') then o.net_pay_amount else 0 end), 0.00) as orderAmount from jst_order_main o where o.del_flag = '0' and and o.create_time >= #{startTime} and o.create_time < #{endTime} group by date_format(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by statDate asc

select o.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, count(1) as orderCount from jst_order_main o left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = o.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where o.del_flag = '0' and and o.create_time >= #{startTime} and o.create_time < #{endTime} and o.contest_id is not null group by o.contest_id, c.contest_name order by count(1) desc, o.contest_id asc limit 5

select o.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, c.category as category, count(1) as enrollCount from jst_order_main o left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = o.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where o.del_flag = '0' and o.create_time >= #{startTime} and o.create_time < #{endTime} and o.contest_id is not null and o.user_id is not null and exists ( select 1 from jst_rebate_ledger rl where rl.order_id = o.order_id and rl.channel_id = #{channelId} and rl.del_flag = '0' ) and exists ( select 1 from jst_student_channel_binding b where b.user_id = o.user_id and b.channel_id = #{channelId} and b.status = 'active' ) group by o.contest_id, c.contest_name, c.category order by count(1) desc, o.contest_id asc limit #{limit}

select coalesce(nullif(u.real_name, ''), nullif(u.nickname, ''), concat('U', o.user_id)) as studentName, count(1) as enrollCount, coalesce(sum(case when o.order_status in ('paid', 'reviewing', 'in_service', 'aftersale', 'completed') then o.net_pay_amount else 0 end), 0.00) as payAmount from jst_order_main o left join jst_user u on u.user_id = o.user_id and u.del_flag = '0' where o.del_flag = '0' and o.user_id is not null and exists ( select 1 from jst_rebate_ledger rl where rl.order_id = o.order_id and rl.channel_id = #{channelId} and rl.del_flag = '0' ) and exists ( select 1 from jst_student_channel_binding b where b.user_id = o.user_id and b.channel_id = #{channelId} and b.status = 'active' ) group by o.user_id, u.real_name, u.nickname order by count(1) desc, coalesce(sum(case when o.order_status in ('paid', 'reviewing', 'in_service', 'aftersale', 'completed') then o.net_pay_amount else 0 end), 0.00) desc, o.user_id asc limit #{limit}
select channel_id from jst_order_main where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select o.order_id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, o.participant_id as participantId, p.name as participantName, o.user_id as userId, coalesce(nullif(u.real_name, ''), nullif(u.nickname, ''), concat('U', o.user_id)) as studentName, u.mobile as studentMobile, o.order_status as orderStatus, o.refund_status as refundStatus, o.points_used as pointsUsed, o.create_time as createTime, o.pay_time as payTime, o.channel_id as ownerChannelId, ch.channel_name as ownerChannelName, ch.channel_type as ownerChannelType, coalesce((select oi.list_amount from jst_order_item oi where oi.order_id = o.order_id and oi.del_flag = '0' order by oi.item_id asc limit 1), o.list_amount) as priceOriginal, coalesce((select oi.coupon_share from jst_order_item oi where oi.order_id = o.order_id and oi.del_flag = '0' order by oi.item_id asc limit 1), o.coupon_amount) as couponDiscount, coalesce((select oi.points_share from jst_order_item oi where oi.order_id = o.order_id and oi.del_flag = '0' order by oi.item_id asc limit 1), o.points_deduct_amount) as pointsDiscount, coalesce((select oi.net_pay_share from jst_order_item oi where oi.order_id = o.order_id and oi.del_flag = '0' order by oi.item_id asc limit 1), o.net_pay_amount) as userNetPay, coalesce((select oi.service_fee_share from jst_order_item oi where oi.order_id = o.order_id and oi.del_flag = '0' order by oi.item_id asc limit 1), o.service_fee) as platformFee, (select rl.rebate_base from jst_rebate_ledger rl where rl.order_id = o.order_id and rl.channel_id = o.channel_id and rl.direction = 'positive' and rl.del_flag = '0' order by rl.ledger_id desc limit 1) as rebateBase, (select rl.rebate_amount from jst_rebate_ledger rl where rl.order_id = o.order_id and rl.channel_id = o.channel_id and rl.direction = 'positive' and rl.del_flag = '0' order by rl.ledger_id desc limit 1) as rebateAmount, (select rl.create_time from jst_rebate_ledger rl where rl.order_id = o.order_id and rl.channel_id = o.channel_id and rl.direction = 'positive' and rl.del_flag = '0' order by rl.ledger_id desc limit 1) as rebateTime, null as originalParticipantName from jst_order_main o left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = o.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = o.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_user u on u.user_id = o.user_id and u.del_flag = '0' left join jst_channel ch on ch.channel_id = o.channel_id and ch.del_flag = '0' where o.order_id = #{orderId} and o.del_flag = '0' limit 1
